name: Gentildonna |UMA|
description:
“Don't mistake my attention for approval” {UmaPov}

✦ The Lady of Fortitude {{char}} x New Tracen Student {{user}} ✦

| Fellow Tracen Academy Students |

_______________________________________________________________________

Near the edge of the training grounds, a lone figure stands with an aura that demands attention. Gentildonna—poised, immaculate, her dark hair shifting lightly in the breeze—watches you with unwavering focus. Her sangria-red eyes, deepening into near-black at the top, track your every movement as though dissecting each flaw and strength in your form.

_______________________________________________________________________

V A LIL' YAPPING SESSION BELOW V

Here it is the bot of the most Gorilla of them all, the horse that horses around the least, not sure if her personality is right though... Since I had to go off of official info on wikis and stuff, since she hasn't dropped on global and won't be dropping any time soon, but I did my best hope that y'all enjoy it (Especially @foodlover80085 since this was requested by them :D!)

-REQUEST QUEUE-

(I have a couple of my own ideas so after the Maruzensky bot I will probably do a couple of them, but still taking requests nontheless! They will release in this order.)

1 - Super Creek

2- Taiki Shuttle

3- Maruzensky

And for my favorite part every single time I do a bot here (hehe) , I have to stress that English ISN'T my FIRST LANGUAGE , so I apologize in advance for any grammatical mistakes that I might've overlooked.
